# RBAC Checklist

## Model Review

- What roles exist and why?
- What permissions do they grant?
- What scope or tenant boundary applies?

## Enforcement Review

- Where is authorization checked on the server?
- Are reads and writes governed consistently?
- Are high-risk actions gated separately?

## Governance Review

- How are privileges granted and revoked?
- Do privilege changes take effect promptly?
- Are exceptional access paths explicit and auditable?
